creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
I tried to reproduce it on re0/ath0 machine (dell vostro 3267 desktop) and inserted ue0, but this machine's ue0 does not become a member of lagg0 even when I turn on the power. It is probably because ue0 has not yet appeared at the time of creating lagg0. So I added the following to rc.conf, using patched netif.
ifconfig_lagg0="up laggproto failover laggport ue0 laggport wlan0 192.168.X.X netmask 255.255.255.0 "
netif_wait_timeout=60
netif_wait_if="ue0"
Also, in /boot/loader.conf
if_axge_load="YES"
(It is necessary to load if_axge.ko with loader beforehand to wait for ue0 appear before the timing to automatic load if_axge.)
The result good worked.

Next, I put this patched netif in the machine(dell xps 12 9Q33 notebook) of ue0 and iwm0, and this also worked properly. It seems that it is because ue0 is still being created at the timing of calling wpa_supplicant with non-patched netif.
